channel.title: News on UnityChip Verification
channel.description: Recent content in News on UnityChip Verification

item.title: Breaking News | Wanzhong Yixin Paper Accepted by ISCA 2026: Redefining Hardware Verification with a "Software-Native" Approach
item.description: Recently, the research achievement of the Wanzhong Yixin team, ‘Democratizing and Accelerating Hardware Verification with Software-Native Optimization,’ has been officially accepted by ISCA 2026. This is a landmark work in the field of hardware verification methodology.

item.title: [Technical Interpretation] Open Source Tool Picker—Say Goodbye to Manual DPI, Use Picker Pack to Achieve Python-Driven UVM Automated Verification
item.description: The open-source tool Picker launched by the “Thousands of Chips in Unity” open verification platform has successfully achieved efficient cross-language verification. Developers can use a single command to complete the conversion from RTL-level code to multi-language software packages.

item.title: First "Thousands of Chips in Unity" Hackathon Successfully Concluded! UCAgent Chip Verification AI Agent Successfully Completed Practical Testing
item.description: After 48 hours of intensive technical sprint, the first “Thousands of Chips in Unity” Open Source Chip Hackathon successfully concluded on December 7th.
